verses.1: A Song of degrees of David. If it had not been the LORD who was on our side, now may Israel say;
verses.2: If it had not been the LORD who was on our side, when men rose up against us:
verses.3: Then they had swallowed us up quick, when their wrath was kindled against us:
verses.4: Then the waters had overwhelmed us, the stream had gone over our soul:
verses.5: Then the proud waters had gone over our soul.
verses.6: Blessed be the LORD, who hath not given us as a prey to their teeth.
verses.7: Our soul hath escaped as a bird out of the snare of the fowlers: the snare is broken, and we have escaped.
verses.8: Our help is in the name of the LORD, who made heaven and earth.

metadata.source: Webster's Bible (1833) — presented as-is with minor editorial corrections for the ABIDE Bible App.
